title: memecylon memoratum
intro: Memecylon memoratum, also known as the 'Kadupul', is a rare and unique flowering plant native to Sri Lanka. It is known for its fragrant and showy white flowers, which bloom only at night and wilt by dawn, making it a highly prized and sought-after species. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The leaves and flowers of Memecylon memoratum are used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system.
